summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Context Lens paper reading app with AI-powered word lookup. Backend APIs fully functional, frontend working well with one minor clipboard permission issue.

ui_bugs.issue: Clipboard write permission denied causing runtime error overlay
ui_bugs.details: Browser security restriction prevents clipboard access, causing webpack dev overlay to appear and block interactions

passed_tests: Paper listing and retrieval by ID
AI word lookup with Gemini 3 Flash integration
Word lookup caching functionality (cached=true on repeat)
Homepage loads with Context Lens title and navigation
Paper upload form with paste text and PDF upload tabs
Paper reader with clickable words and word count badge
AI explanation panel with loading animation and content display
Navigation between Papers and Saved sections
Paper list display and paper selection
Back navigation from paper reader and bookmarks
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix clipboard permission issue in copy functionality - consider using a fallback method or handling the permission error gracefully to prevent runtime error overlay
